gain_model.coverage_note: abs saturates ~0.65 by coverage 0.7-1.0 at fixed anchors; at 0 anchors abs=0.0 and eqred=0.0 for ALL coverage values (measured)
gain_model.caveat: p_anchor/p_avail are stated estimates (flagged), not measurements; all downstream numbers are arithmetic on measured surface cells

acquisitions_ranked.name: Egyptian-rendered toponym equation on newly published LA text (Amnisos i-m-n-y-s3 / Kydonia k3-tw-n3-y / Knossos k-n-s class, >=4 LA slots)
acquisitions_ranked.status: EXCAVATION-GATED (WP-D: overlap empty after ~120 yrs; base rate ~0-2 new LA docs/yr)
acquisitions_ranked.value: IF realized: eqred ~9.14 log10 of 63.4 (abs ~0.113); EXTRAPOLATED (LA-matched slots-2 cell x cov-0.55 slots ratio); measured cov-0.55 upper bound eqred=6.8, abs=0.142. Residual still >= 10^54

acquisitions_ranked.name: Systematic join search in the HT archive (RTI/3D of fragment edges)
acquisitions_ranked.absolute_value_bits: only if a join completes an externally-equated word (P~0.02)
acquisitions_ranked.value: lengthens words; the PA-I-TO pin fails WP-D's >=4-slot bar at 3 slots/1 site — a join or new attestation is the cheapest way to move an EXISTING pin

acquisitions_ranked.name: Bilingual / biscriptal fragment (LA + any read script)
acquisitions_ranked.status: NOT KNOWN TO EXIST (P~0.002 within 2 yrs)
acquisitions_ranked.value: only acquisition class that can reach the (12,8,12) frontier (abs 0.9722); conservative Art.-XI bound (single provenance = 1 lineage) caps it at eqred ~14.63 log10 / abs ~0.27

acquisitions_ranked.name: Ingest the Anetaki ivory scepter (Knossos cult center, ~119 signs; Kanta, Nakassis, Palaima & Perna, Ariadne Supplements, 2025)
acquisitions_ranked.status: AVAILABLE_NOW (published 2025; NOT in silver corpus — only KNZg55/57 Anetaki pieces are)
acquisitions_ranked.value: longest continuous LA text (~119 signs vs KNZf13's 19); non-administrative, numeral-free => unique held-out gold for L2/L3 structural claims (libation order, A-prefixation, formula slots); ~+1.5% corpus tokens; possible new attestations of A-only signs in ritual vocabulary

acquisitions_ranked.name: Full Knossos-cult-center (Anetaki plot) final epigraphic edition beyond the scepter
acquisitions_ranked.status: ROLLING (Ariadne 2025 overview out; further volumes expected)
acquisitions_ranked.value: more KN non-administrative texts; new-site-class contexts for A-only ritual signs; held-out gold

acquisitions_ranked.name: SigLA raw stroke vectors from Salgarella/Castellan (unblock WP-E)
acquisitions_ranked.status: SOURCE_BLOCKED; data exists as drawings; requires author contact
acquisitions_ranked.value: unblocks the stroke channel for sign-identity/allography ONLY; H-lineage is circular for values (Art. XI)

acquisitions_ranked.name: Kom el-Hettan recollation / new Aegean-list fragments (Sourouzian excavation, ongoing)
acquisitions_ranked.status: Egyptian side may grow; binds NOTHING without the LA-side attestation (WP-D)
acquisitions_ranked.value: raises the menu of Egyptian-rendered toponyms awaiting an LA match; zero bits until ACQ-02 fires

acquisitions_ranked.name: Routine new-excavation LA documents (Sissi, Zominthos, Palaikastro 2022+, Gournia)
acquisitions_ranked.value: coverage axis only; G: 0 anchors => abs 0.0 at every coverage (measured)

headline.best_single_acquisition_for_absolute_amb: NONE AVAILABLE NOW reduces the 10^63.4 residual at all; expectation-weighted best = ACQ-02 (Egyptian-attested toponym on a new LA text): E[eqred] ~ 0.27 log10; conditional-on-realization best = ACQ-03 bilingual
